mapper.select:
SELECT s.PK_NO, s.PERSON_ID, s.SHIFT_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(s.SHIFT_NO, #{lang}) AS SHIFT_NAME, s.AR_DATE_STR, s.LOCK_YN, s.ACTIVITY, s.ORDERNO, s.ADD_FLAG, s.TYPEID, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(s.TYPEID, #{lang}) AS TYPE_NAME, s.REMARK, s.UPDATE_DATE, s.UPDATED_BY, e.EMPID, e.LOCAL_NAME FROM AR_SCHEDULE_HTSV s LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE e ON s.PERSON_ID = e.PERSON_ID
AND s.AR_DATE_STR LIKE #{month} || '%'
AND (e.EMPID LIKE '%' || #{empId} || '%' OR e.LOCAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{empId} || '%')
ORDER BY s.AR_DATE_STR DESC, s.UPDATE_DATE DESC

SELECT s.PK_NO, s.PERSON_ID, s.SHIFT_NO, s.AR_DATE_STR, s.LOCK_YN, s.ACTIVITY, s.ORDERNO, s.ADD_FLAG, s.TYPEID, s.REMARK, e.EMPID, e.LOCAL_NAME FROM AR_SCHEDULE_HTSV s LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE e ON s.PERSON_ID = e.PERSON_ID WHERE s.PK_NO = #{pkNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_SCHEDULE_HTSV ( PK_NO, PERSON_ID, SHIFT_NO, AR_DATE_STR, LOCK_YN, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, ADD_FLAG, CREATED_IP, TYPEID, REMARK ) VALUES ( AR_SCHEDULE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shiftNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{arDateStr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{lockYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NVL(#{addFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N'), #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{typeid, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE AR_SCHEDULE_HTSV
PERSON_ID = #{personId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIFT_NO = #{shiftNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AR_DATE_STR = #{arDateStr, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LOCK_YN = #{lockYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ACTIVITY = #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ORDERNO = #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ADD_FLAG = #{addFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TYPEID = #{typeid, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
WHERE PK_NO = #{pkNo}
